chunks.text: Course: EE 290Q | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 290Q. Advanced Topics in Electrical Engineering: Advanced Topics in Communication Networks Catalog Description: The 290 courses cover current topics of research interest in electrical engineering. The course content may vary from semester to semester. Units: 1-3 Also Offered As: ELENG 290Q Related Areas: Information, Data, Network, and Communication Sciences (IDNCS) Power and Energy (ENE) Prerequisites: Consent of instructor. Formats: Fall: 1-3 hours of lecture per week Spring: 1-3 hours of lecture per week Grading Basis: Student Option Final Exam Status: No Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
